text: The battery life is incredible and lasts me two full days. The screen is bright and crisp. Honestly the best phone I have owned.
Great camera and gorgeous display, but the battery drains way too fast and it gets hot while charging. Disappointed for the price.
Solid performance and the build quality feels premium. Delivery was quick too. Wish the speakers were louder though.
Customer service was terrible and took a week to reply. The phone itself is fine but the support experience ruined it for me.
Screen is beautiful but way too reflective outdoors. Battery is average. Price is a bit high for what you get.
Fast, smooth, and the camera takes stunning low light photos. Setup was easy and shipping arrived a day early.
The sound quality is rich and the noise cancellation is excellent. Battery could be better but the case charges fast.
Comfortable fit but they keep disconnecting during calls. The app is buggy and crashes on my phone.
Amazing value for the price. Crisp audio, tight bass, and the battery easily lasts a full workday.
Decent buds. The microphone quality on calls is poor but music playback sounds great. Delivery took longer than expected.
One earbud stopped working after two weeks and the warranty process is a nightmare. Customer support ignored my emails.
Battery lasts a full week which is fantastic. The heart rate sensor is accurate. The strap feels cheap though.
Gorgeous display, snappy interface, and the fitness tracking is spot on. Worth every riyal.
The screen scratches far too easily and the software is laggy. Sleep tracking is wildly inaccurate.
Good watch overall. Battery is great and the app is clean, but the price is steep compared to competitors.
Shipping was fast and packaging was excellent. Comfortable to wear all day. GPS locks on quickly during runs.
The display is stunning but the battery is a dealbreaker. Also the price keeps going up while quality stays the same.
Really good noise cancellation and the fit is secure for workouts. The touch controls are a little too sensitive.
